barRaise.topFinding: Fourteenth review, and the thirteen-cycle at-risk pattern broke: 0.51.0 landed the keystone writer fix (write-dashboard-status.ps1 is now read-modify-write and preserves the barRaise + audit blocks), wired the service-worker CACHE_VERSION into the release version-sync gate, de-duplicated two double-installed handlers, and froze the numbered-file accretion (no styles-v14, no mobile-hooks-7). Four standing HIGHs are now gone or correctly downgraded. What remains is ordinary pre-1.0 debt: an unminified release bundle, a 12-layer CSS cascade awaiting consolidation, a TypeScript-major straddle, and two doc-home gaps (the Decision 30 entry and a basket-coordinate launch gate). Verdict improves one tier to needs-attention, the healthiest YaC has read in the series.
